title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech presented enhancements to data analytics agents with new capabilities for data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. The session covered new developer tools including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, accessible via Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs like VSCode.
writeup: The session from Google Cloud Tech outlines updates to data analytics agents spanning data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. It introduces developer tooling, including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, reachable through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs such as VSCode. The takeaway is that these agents and protocol integrations connect across multiple coding environments rather than a single proprietary surface.
